CreateVpc.name: VPC name, 1-65 characters, cannot be 'default'
CreateVpc.cidr: IPv4 CIDR block of the VPC, e.g. 192.168.0.0/16
CreateVpc.enableIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 (true=enable, default false)
CreateVpc.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to attach to the VPC

DescribeVpcs.vpcIds: Comma-separated list of VPC IDs to query

DescribeVpc.desc: Get detailed information about a specific VPC

UpdateVpc.desc: Update VPC name, description, or other attributes
UpdateVpc.vpcId: ID of the VPC to update
UpdateVpc.name: New VPC name, 1-65 characters, cannot be 'default'
UpdateVpc.secondaryCidr: List of secondary CIDR blocks for the VPC (full replacement)

DeleteVpc.desc: Delete a VPC. Ensure no subnets or other resources exist inside
DeleteVpc.vpcId: ID of the VPC to delete

DescribeVpcPrivateIps.desc: Query private IP address information within a VPC
DescribeVpcPrivateIps.privateIpAddresses: List of private IPs to query (mutually exclusive with privateIpRange)

DescribeVpcResourceIps.desc: Query private IPs occupied by cloud products within a VPC
DescribeVpcResourceIps.resourceType: Product type, e.g. bcc, enic, blb

DisableVpcRelay.desc: Disable VPC relay (relay must be currently enabled)
